experience.title: Operations & Training Consultant / Franchisee / General Manager

skills_and_achievements: Full-cycle accounting for multi-entity environments; payroll (W-2/1099, adjustments, direct deposit); AP/AR, PO processing, vendor management (50+ vendors); bank and credit card reconciliations; journal entries, online transfers and payments; GL review, monthly financials, management reports and forecasts; cost control and purchasing; collections and billing dispute resolution; HR confidentiality (pay rates, grades) and file maintenance; training, inspections, and operations streamlining.
